task_description: Re-implement the remaining features from the deleted PR branch, focusing on client-side rendering: additional chart types (heatmap, funnel, waterfall, bubble, polar area), drill-down, cross-chart filtering, drag-and-drop dashboard layout editor, dashboard versioning, advanced PDF/PNG export, server-side caching layer, embed routes, and WebSocket real-time support.

verification.summary: Vite client build succeeds (3346 modules, 10.5s). TypeScript compilation has zero errors in new/modified files (pre-existing errors in test files and some other pages remain unchanged). All 18 files properly committed across 3 commits.
